case_title: 1045 MISSION, L.P. VS. BALABHADRA GRAVELEY et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVELEY, BALABHADRA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAVELEY, BALABHADRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1045 MISSION STREET, PARKING SPACE #171, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT GRAVELEY, BALABHADRA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
